statement: In every magma, Equation 1911 (`x = (y * (x * z)) * (y * w)`) implies Equation 1557 (`x = (y * z) * (x * (y * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0926
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op x z)) (op y w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op x (op y y)))
